description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted from the waist down. The figure is wearing straight-cut pants that appear to be slightly loose, with subtle creases suggesting a casual or semi-formal style. The shoes are simple and flat, with a rounded toe and minimal detailing, suitable for walking in urban environments. The legs are positioned close together, indicating a neutral, standing posture. The overall silhouette is realistic, with natural proportions and smooth transitions between the pants and shoes. There are no visible accessories or carried objects, and the clothing appears to be unadorned.
description: An adult pedestrian shown from the waist down, wearing straight-cut pants and simple flat shoes in a neutral standing pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pant legs and the tops of the shoes, with a clear view of the creases and overall fit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the pants and the side of the shoe, with a visible pant seam.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pants and shoes, with subtle folds and a straight silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the pant seam and the side profile of the shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: straight-cut pants with a relaxed fit and simple flat shoes
